docket_entries.description: PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF WEST VALLEY COLLECTION SERVICES, INC.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST VALLEY COLLECTION SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KARACSONY, PETER IND/DBA WEST BAY COMPUTER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARACSONY, PETER IND/DBA WEST BAY COMPUTER $4,700.21 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,700.21, IF DEF. PAYS $1,500 TO PL. BY 6-13-96, THIS AMOUNT IS ACCEPT ED AS PMT. IN FULL.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-06-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01

C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. NOT PRESENT, BUT REPRESENTED BY OFFICE OF JONATHAN HICKMAN. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY STIP - JUDGMENT FOR PL. & AGAINST DEF. FOR $4,700.21. IF DEF. PAYS TO PL. $1,500 BY 6-13-96 THIS AMOUNT WILL BE ACCEPTED BY PL. AS PMT IN FULL. IF DEF.FAILS TO MAKE 6-13-96 PMT, PL. BY DECL. & WITHOU ANY FURTHER NOTICE TO DEF. MAY HAVE JUDGMENT FOR FULL AMOUNT. PL. ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
